text: When it comes to removing asphalt shingles, nothing beats the Red Ripper.
Red Ripper is a robustly constructed asphalt shingle removal tool that
improves roofing tear-off performance and worker productivity by up to 30%
thanks to its unique patented ripping head design. Red Rippers are available in
three formats, long handle, D handle and short handle.
The long handle ripper is a 48 inch straight handle tool that provides greater reach and
leverage. This means less bending and more torque, especially when ripping
shingles on downward facing slopes of steep pitch roofs. The D grip handle
ripper is a 42 inch handle tool with the D grip handle that provides maximum
torque and leverage when ripping shingles.
The Ripping Head has patented Y-shaped ripping teeth in the front and back
edges of the tool which rapidly removes shingles, nails, staples and screws in a
single pass. The Red Ripper is made from heat treated carbon steel with
reinforced steel flanges and deflector fins on the ripping head that
effortlessly guide ripped shingles around the tool head while ripping is in
progress. This unique design is what makes the Red Ripper smoother, faster and
stronger than any other shingle removal tool on the market.
Professional roofers who use the Red Ripper seldom buy another tool which is
why Red Ripper has become North America's number one selling shingle
tear-off tool.
